verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of David. Rescue me, LORD, from evil people; Protect me from violent men
verses.2: Who devise evil things in their hearts; They continually stir up wars.
verses.3: They sharpen their tongues like a snake; The venom of a viper is under their lips. Selah
verses.4: Keep me, LORD, from the hands of the wicked; Protect me from violent men Who intend to trip up my feet.
verses.5: The proud have hidden a trap for me, and snares; They have spread a net at the wayside; They have set snares for me. Selah
verses.6: I said to the LORD, “You are my God; Listen, LORD, to the sound of my pleadings.
verses.7: “GOD the Lord, the strength of my salvation, You have covered my head on the day of battle.
verses.8: “Do not grant, LORD, the desires of the wicked; Do not bring about his evil planning, so that they are not exalted. Selah
verses.9: “As for the head of those who surround me, May the harm of their lips cover them.
verses.10: “May burning coals fall upon them; May they be cast into the fire, Into bottomless pits from which they cannot rise.
verses.11: “May a slanderer not endure on the earth; May evil hunt a violent person violently.”
verses.12: I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the afflicted, And justice for the poor.
verses.13: Certainly the righteous will give thanks to Your name; The upright will dwell in Your presence.
